description: Send 1000 compressed messages each of payload size 256, auto-fragment to 0 octets. Use default permessage-deflate offer.
expectation: Receive echo'ed messages (with payload as sent). Timeout case after 120 secs.
httpRequest:
GET /wss HTTP/1.1
User-Agent: AutobahnTestSuite/25.10.1-0.10.9
Host: 127.0.0.1:8889
Upgrade: WebSocket
Connection: Upgrade
Pragma: no-cache
Cache-Control: no-cache
Sec-WebSocket-Key: mvsDBBlbk2P9CD/yJugyJg==
Sec-WebSocket-Extensions: permessage-deflate; client_no_context_takeover; client_max_window_bits
Sec-WebSocket-Version: 13
httpResponse:
HTTP/1.1 101 Switching Protocols
Date: Wed, 12 Nov 2025 13:25:17 GMT
Connection: Upgrade
Upgrade: websocket
Sec-Websocket-Extensions: permessage-deflate; client_no_context_takeover
Sec-Websocket-Accept: fxhZB4wUOs4gW2FNGxaLr+N3K2g=
result: Case did not finish within 120 seconds.
resultClose: The connection was failed by the wrong endpoint
wasNotCleanReason: peer dropped the TCP connection without previous WebSocket closing handshake
